problem: What material is biocompatible, conductive, and flexible enough for long-term brain implants?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to long-term, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
